reasoning: 386 hanabi festivals returned with correct kind_tag, showing strong retrieval. However most records lack prefecture, coordinates, dates, and English descriptions — an agent can confirm Japan has hanabi but cannot recommend specific timing or location to an English-speaking traveler.
missing_data: Date/month of each festival, prefecture for ~70% of items, English name/description, ticket/access info.
improvement_hint: Enrich hanabi records with event_date, prefecture_code, and English description from each festival's Wikipedia page or official site.

reasoning: Japanese-language request returns identical corpus to L3-01 but with ja lang. Same coverage and same data gaps: no dates, sparse prefecture tagging, no Japanese descriptions on most items. Useful list but thin for trip planning.
missing_data: 開催月・都道府県・アクセス情報がほとんどのアイテムに欠落している。
improvement_hint: 花火大会レコードに開催月フィールドを追加し、Wikidata の P585 (point in time) を取り込む。

reasoning: Query asks for snow festivals in Hokkaido. Tool returns count:0 for Hokkaido festivals and falls back to national UNESCO intangible heritage list — none of which are snow festivals or even in Hokkaido. The famous Sapporo Snow Festival (雪まつり) is missing entirely.
missing_data: Sapporo Snow Festival, Asahikawa Winter Festival, and other yuki-matsuri in Hokkaido are absent.
improvement_hint: Add kind_tag 'yuki_matsuri' / 'winter_festival' to the festivals corpus; ensure Sapporo Snow Festival has prefecture_code 01 so prefecture filter works.

reasoning: Query is Chinese and asks for authentic rural life experience (田舎暮らし体験). Tool calls get_japan_heritage() which returns National Treasures and heritage structures — no rural stays, agritourism, or 里山 experiences. Topic mismatch is the primary failure.
missing_data: Rural homestay (農家民宿), satoyama experiences, agritourism programs, WWOOF-style stays.
improvement_hint: Route '田舎' / '農家' intent to search_area or get_spots with kind filter; or add 'agritourism' kind_tag to municipal scrape records.

reasoning: 140 matches including named 紅葉 spots with coordinates, heritage designations, and kind tags (sakura_meisho_100 co-occurring). Korean lang returned. Key fall-foliage destinations (Kenroku-en, Matsumae Castle, Himeji Castle) present. Missing seasonality metadata and Korean name translations.
missing_data: Best viewing months per location, Korean-language names/descriptions for most items.
improvement_hint: Add peak autumn leaf month range field to spot records; populate ko name translations for top-tier 紅葉 attractions.

reasoning: Query asks for quiet, non-touristy meditation spots. Tool returns 修行 (ascetic training) which is semantically adjacent. Results include meditation-related temples and a ninja experience (irrelevant). Does not surface well-known zazen/shukubo temples like Eiheiji or Koyasan.
missing_data: Shukubo (temple lodging) options, zazen experience venues, Koyasan / Eiheiji specifically.
improvement_hint: Add 'shukubo' and 'zazen_experience' kind tags; boost 修行体験 spots that are temple-affiliated over ninja / event entries.

reasoning: Aurora borealis are extremely rare in Japan and visible only at high latitudes during intense solar storms. Tool returns dark_sky observatories, national parks, and a ropeway — none of which are actual aurora viewing sites. The response equips an agent to answer a 'stargazing' query but not the specific aurora intent.
missing_data: Honest note that Japan is not a reliable aurora destination; Hokkaido dark-sky sites with low light pollution context.
improvement_hint: Detect 'aurora' intent and route to dark_sky kind filter scoped to Hokkaido; prepend a note that aurora sightings in Japan are rare and location-dependent.

reasoning: Query asks for 100-year-old house stays (古民家宿泊). Tool returns Gifu hotels: mostly onsen ryokan (hito_yu_kai) and modern OSM lodging. No machiya or kominka guesthouses appear. The constraint 'old house' is entirely unaddressed.
missing_data: Kominka guesthouses in Shirakawa-go, Hida Folk Village accommodation, machiya stays in Takayama.
improvement_hint: Add 'kominka' kind_tag to accommodation records; ingest listings from regional tourism boards that classify traditional-building stays.

reasoning: Thai query seeking hidden cherry blossom spots. 215 matches include sakura_meisho_100 items. However top results rank Kenroku-en and Himeji Castle as 'must_see' — these are famous tourist spots, opposite of 穴場 (hidden gems). The query's 'non-touristy' constraint is not surfaced by the ranking.
missing_data: Low-crowd_band sakura spots, Thai language names/descriptions.
improvement_hint: When query contains 穴場 or equivalent, surface spots with crowd_band='low' first among sakura_meisho_100 items.

reasoning: 53 results mixing curated 絶景 route pages and specific scenic spots. Ehime DMO content and Niigata scenic overview are practical for planning. Lacks coordinates on some spot entries and no structured 'photography' metadata. Reasonable broad coverage.
missing_data: GPS coordinates for DMO/spot results, recommended seasons/times for photography, explicit scenery type (coastal/mountain/etc).
improvement_hint: Normalise DMO feature-page results to extract named sub-spots with coordinates; add photography_friendly boolean or scenic_type field.

reasoning: 72 露天風呂 results in Arabic. Records contain meaningful Japanese descriptions of outdoor baths with natural settings. Addresses the 'nature, not hotel' nuance partially via hito_yu_kai remote onsen entries. Arabic translations absent; location diversity is mostly Ehime-heavy.
missing_data: Arabic-language descriptions, dedicated 野天風呂 (wild outdoor bath) kind tag, geographic spread beyond Ehime.
improvement_hint: Add 'noten_buro' kind_tag for truly outdoor/wild-spring baths distinct from hotel facilities; expand Arabic translation coverage for onsen records.

reasoning: Query specifically asks to swim with wild dolphins. Results include an Ishikawa aquarium with dolphin shows and a fish market — neither addresses wild dolphin swimming. Mikurajima (三宅島/御蔵島) dolphin swimming, the most famous such experience in Japan, is absent.
missing_data: 御蔵島 (Mikurajima) wild dolphin swimming, Amami wild dolphin snorkeling operators.
wrong_data: First result (Kyoto cultural ambassador page) is completely off-topic noise.
improvement_hint: Add 'dolphin_swimming' / 'wildlife_marine' kind_tag; suppress nav/listing pages that happen to contain 'イルカ' in passing.

reasoning: Query wants traditional architecture untouched by modernization — matching 重伝建 districts well. Tool get_japan_heritage() returns 104 Nihon Isan items, which are cultural heritage *stories*, not preservation districts. Some overlap exists but the canonical 重伝建 list (Important Preservation Districts) is a different registry.
missing_data: 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区 list (Shirakawa-go, Tsumago, Uchiko, etc.) is the ideal data source here.
improvement_hint: Route '重伝建' / 'traditional architecture' intent to search_area with preservation_district kind filter; cross-link get_japan_heritage to heritage_designations 'Q850649'.

reasoning: Query in Vietnamese for Ainu culture in Hokkaido. Response returns National Ainu Museum, Upopoy, Nibutani Ainu Culture Museum, Hokkaido Ainu Center, and Kawamura Kaneto Museum — all in Hokkaido, all directly relevant. Good specificity with coordinates, websites, visit_minutes. Missing Vietnamese translations.
missing_data: Vietnamese-language names/descriptions; Ainu craft experience workshops beyond museum visits.
improvement_hint: Add Vietnamese translation for top Ainu cultural spots; include 'ainu_experience' tagged spots for craft/food workshops.

reasoning: 73 磨崖仏 results. Top hits are Usuki Stone Buddhas (National Treasure, prominence 0.9) and Oya-dera — both well-known, correctly designated. Good geographic spread (Oita, Tochigi, Shiga, Kagoshima). Heritage designations accurate. Solid response for a niche query.
missing_data: Visiting hours, admission fees, nearest transit for most items; English descriptions absent for several.
improvement_hint: Add opening_hours and fee fields to heritage attraction records from official site scraping.

reasoning: Query asks for day-trip volcano hikes from Tokyo. Tool returns volcanoes nationwide: Mt. Iwate (Tohoku), Mt. Unzen (Kyushu), Lake Towada — none are day-trippable from Tokyo. Mt. Fuji appears second but no Tokyo-distance context. Mt. Mihara (Oshima) and Mt. Tanigawa are absent.
missing_data: Distance/transit time from Tokyo for each volcano; day-trip feasibility flag; Oshima Island (Mt. Mihara) specifically.
improvement_hint: Add travel_time_from_tokyo field or use plan_feasibility_check routing; filter volcano results by prefecture proximity to Tokyo for day-trip queries.

reasoning: Indonesian query for freshly made tofu at a temple. Results return GI tofu products, regional tofu types, and a mountain-spring tofu shop (Kongosan) — but no temple-tofu experience. Koya-san shojin ryori (temple cuisine with tofu) is the canonical answer and is absent.
missing_data: Shojin ryori experiences at Koyasan, Eiheiji, and Kyoto zen temples; explicit 'temple tofu making' workshop listings.
improvement_hint: Add 'shojin_ryori' kind_tag to temple-cuisine records; link tofu-related spots to nearby temple entities.

reasoning: Query seeks 'fishing villages frozen in time.' Results include a sakura-ebi fishery event page, active Itoman fishing port, and a fish market — not preserved historic fishing villages. Dogashima, Ine no Funaya (boathouse village), and Tomo-no-ura should surface prominently.
missing_data: Ine-cho funaya boathouses (京都), Tomo-no-ura (広島), Dogashima — designated traditional fishing settlement areas.
wrong_data: One result (白浜漁港) is a page about entry restrictions — not useful tourist content.
improvement_hint: Add 'funaya' / 'gyoson_preservation' kind_tag for historic fishing village designations; filter out regulatory/access-restriction pages.

reasoning: 231 METI traditional craft records. First entry is Ainu Attus weaving, not washi. Washi (Japanese paper) is a METI-designated craft and should appear, but results are sorted by craft_id rather than relevance to the query. No workshop/experience booking info present.
missing_data: Direct washi-making experience venues (Echizen, Mino, Kurotani); workshop booking contacts.
improvement_hint: Sort get_local_specialty results by query relevance (BM25/vector) when q is implicit; add 'experience_available' boolean field for crafts with visitor workshops.

reasoning: 104 宿場 results. Top items are Tsumago-juku and Narai-juku (both Important Preservation Districts), Seki-juku — highly on-target for 時代劇 (period drama) scenery. Municipal scrape adds rich Nakasendo content. Well-ranked, good heritage labels. Minor gap: no direct 時代劇 film location tags.
missing_data: Specific 時代劇 filming locations (e.g., Toei Uzumasa Eigamura); English names for some shukuba entries.
improvement_hint: Add 'jidaigeki_location' kind_tag linking to actual film studio sets like Toei Kyoto Studio Park.

reasoning: 115 beach results. Response covers Okinawa beaches but most have crowd_band='medium' or lack crowd data. 'Not crowded' constraint cannot be served because crowd data is sparse. hakusha_seishou_100 beaches (white sand blue sea list) present but not ranked by remoteness or crowd level.
missing_data: Low-crowd_band beach data; ferry/access info for remote islands; seasonal crowd patterns.
improvement_hint: Populate crowd_band for more beach records; allow filtering by crowd_band='low' in search_area to serve 'uncrowded' queries.

reasoning: 74 横丁 results. Some yokocho venues present (Haikara't Yokocho, Osaka food alley). Top hit is a park with yokocho kind tag — irrelevant. Ebisu Yokocho (Tokyo), Nonbei Yokocho, Harmonica Yokocho are missing. Chinese-language Saga tourism page appears as noise.
missing_data: Ebisu Yokocho, Nonbei Yokocho (Shibuya), Harmonica Yokocho (Kichijoji), Yurakucho Gado-shita.
improvement_hint: Strengthen yokocho kind coverage in Wikidata; suppress nav-category pages (Chinese Saga tourism overview) from yokocho results.

reasoning: German query for rural rail journeys. Returns Sagano Scenic Line, Oigawa Main Line, Ueda Dentetsu Bessho Line (with rich DMO content), Oga Line — diverse and well-tagged as local_railway. Good specificity. Missing German translations and some operational details.
missing_data: German-language descriptions; timetable links; JR Pass validity flag per line.
improvement_hint: Add JR_pass_valid boolean and seasonal operation notes to railway records; expand German translation coverage.

reasoning: 73 ホタル results. Top hit is ホタルイカ (firefly squid) — different species, though tagged as Natural Monument. Actual firefly (Genji-botaru) sites present: Toyota Town Firefly Museum, Kitakyushu page, Toyoda-cho hotaru-fune. Viewing season (June) implied in DMO content. Reasonable coverage with minor ranking noise at top.
missing_data: Peak viewing dates per location; access from major cities; viewing event schedules.
improvement_hint: Disambiguate ホタルイカ (squid) from ホタル (firefly) kind tags; add 'firefly_viewing_season' metadata field.

reasoning: Russian query for winter crane viewing. Top hit is Izumi crane migration grounds (Kagoshima) — the primary site in Japan, correctly tagged crane_wintering, with Ramsar/Special Natural Monument designations. Kushiro Wetlands (Hokkaido red-crowned cranes) also present. Municipality noise (鶴田町 etc.) dilutes ranking.
missing_data: Viewing season (Oct–Mar) and specific observation platforms; Russian-language descriptions; Tsurui Village (鶴居村) Hokkaido crane info.
improvement_hint: Add season_start/season_end fields for wildlife observation kind tags; filter out municipality-name matches from crane-specific queries.
